controls.name: Policies for information security
controls.description: Management direction and support for information security through defined policies. Security policies are documented, reviewed, and communicated to all personnel.

controls.name: Information security roles and responsibilities
controls.description: Information security responsibilities are allocated and defined. Separation of duties is enforced where required.

controls.name: Segregation of duties
controls.description: Conflicting duties and responsibilities are separated to reduce opportunities for unauthorized or unintentional modification of assets.

controls.name: Management responsibilities
controls.description: Management requires personnel to apply information security in accordance with established policies. Security awareness training is mandatory.

controls.name: Contact with authorities and special interest groups
controls.description: Appropriate contacts with relevant authorities are maintained. Membership in security communities is maintained for threat intelligence.

controls.name: Threat intelligence
controls.description: Information about information security threats is collected and analyzed to produce threat intelligence. Intelligence is used to inform risk decisions.

controls.name: Information security in project lifecycle
controls.description: Information security is integrated into the project lifecycle. Security requirements are defined during project initiation.

controls.name: Screening
controls.description: Background verification checks are carried out on personnel before employment. Checks are proportionate to business requirements and legal requirements.

controls.name: Terms and conditions of employment
controls.description: Employment agreements define information security responsibilities. Agreements include confidentiality, acceptable use, and data protection clauses.

controls.name: Information security awareness, education and training
controls.description: Personnel receive appropriate information security awareness education and training. Training is updated regularly and completion is tracked.

controls.name: Disciplinary process
controls.description: A disciplinary process is established and communicated for personnel who commit information security policy violations.

controls.name: Responsibilities after termination
controls.description: Information security responsibilities and duties that remain active after termination are defined and communicated.

controls.name: Physical security perimeters
controls.description: Physical security perimeters are defined and used to protect areas containing information and information processing facilities.

controls.name: Physical entry
controls.description: Secure entry points to areas containing information and information processing facilities. Access is restricted to authorized personnel only.

controls.name: Securing offices, rooms and facilities
controls.description: Physical security of offices, rooms, and facilities is designed and applied. Physical entry controls include authentication mechanisms.

controls.name: User endpoint devices
controls.description: Information stored on, processed by, or accessible via user endpoint devices is protected. Endpoint detection and response is deployed.

controls.name: Privileged access rights
controls.description: Allocation and use of privileged access rights is restricted and managed. Just-in-time access is implemented where feasible.

controls.name: Information access restriction
controls.description: Access to information and application system functions is restricted in accordance with the access control policy. Principle of least privilege is enforced.

controls.name: Access to source code
controls.description: Access to source code is restricted to authorized personnel only. Code review is mandatory for all changes.

controls.name: Secure authentication
controls.description: Secure authentication technologies and procedures are implemented for all systems. MFA is required for administrative access.

controls.name: Capacity management
controls.description: Resource usage is monitored, adjusted, and projected to meet capacity requirements. Auto-scaling is configured for critical services.

controls.name: Protection against malware
controls.description: Protection against malware is implemented and supported by appropriate user awareness. Automated scanning is integrated into CI/CD.

controls.name: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.description: Technical vulnerabilities are identified, evaluated, and addressed in a timely manner. Vulnerability scanning is performed continuously.

controls.name: Configuration management
controls.description: Hardware, software, services, and networks are configured securely. Infrastructure as code is used with version control.

controls.name: Information deletion
controls.description: Information stored on information systems, devices, or in any other storage medium is deleted when no longer needed.

controls.name: Data masking
controls.description: Data masking is applied to limit the exposure of sensitive information. PII is redacted in logs and non-production environments.

controls.name: Data leakage prevention
controls.description: Data leakage prevention measures are applied to systems, networks, and other devices. DLP rules monitor and block sensitive data exfiltration.

controls.name: Information backup
controls.description: Backup copies of information, software, and systems are maintained and regularly tested. Backups follow the 3-2-1 principle.

controls.name: Redundancy of information processing facilities
controls.description: Information processing facilities are implemented with redundancy sufficient to meet availability requirements.

controls.name: Logging
controls.description: Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults, and other relevant events are produced, stored, protected, and analyzed.

controls.name: Monitoring activities
controls.description: Networks, systems, and applications are monitored for anomalous behavior. Alerting is configured for security-relevant events.
